psalm-107-1.verse:
Oh give thanks to the Lord, for He is good,
  For His lovingkindness is everlasting.
psalm-107-1.prayer: Lord, I give thanks to You because You are good. Thank You that Your lovingkindness endures forever.

psalm-107-2.verse:
Let the redeemed of the Lord say so,
  Whom He has redeemed from the hand of the adversary
psalm-107-2.prayer: Father, help me speak of Your redemption and remember how You have rescued me from trouble.

psalm-107-3.verse:
And gathered from the lands,
  From the east and from the west,
  From the north and from the south.
psalm-107-3.prayer: Lord, thank You for gathering Your people from every place. Draw my heart close to You wherever I am.

psalm-107-4.verse:
They wandered in the wilderness in a desert region;
  They did not find a way to an inhabited city.
psalm-107-4.prayer: Father, when I feel lost or without direction, guide me by Your wisdom and lead me toward Your presence.

psalm-107-5.verse:
They were hungry and thirsty;
  Their soul fainted within them.
psalm-107-5.prayer: Lord, when my soul feels hungry, thirsty, or weary, satisfy me with Your goodness and strength.

psalm-107-6.verse:
Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble;
  He delivered them out of their distresses.
psalm-107-6.prayer: Father, when I cry out in trouble, thank You for hearing me and delivering me from distress.

psalm-107-7.verse:
He led them also by a straight way,
  To go to an inhabited city.
psalm-107-7.prayer: Lord, lead me by a straight way and guide my steps toward the place You have prepared.

psalm-107-8.verse:
Let them give thanks to the Lord for His lovingkindness,
  And for His wonders to the sons of men!
psalm-107-8.prayer: Father, help me give thanks for Your lovingkindness and for the wonderful works You do for Your people.

psalm-107-9.verse:
For He has satisfied the thirsty soul,
  And the hungry soul He has filled with what is good.
psalm-107-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for satisfying the thirsty soul and filling the hungry soul with what is good.

psalm-107-10.verse:
There were those who dwelt in darkness and in the shadow of death,
  Prisoners in misery and chains,
psalm-107-10.prayer: Father, when I sit in darkness or feel bound by heaviness, bring Your light, freedom, and hope.

psalm-107-11.verse:
Because they had rebelled against the words of God
  And spurned the counsel of the Most High.
psalm-107-11.prayer: Lord, forgive me when I rebel against Your Word or ignore Your counsel. Lead me back to obedience.

psalm-107-12.verse:
Therefore He humbled their heart with labor;
  They stumbled and there was none to help.
psalm-107-12.prayer: Father, when pride or hardship brings me low, use it to humble my heart and draw me closer to You.

psalm-107-13.verse:
Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble;
  He saved them out of their distresses.
psalm-107-13.prayer: Lord, when I cry to You in trouble, deliver me from distress and restore my hope.

psalm-107-14.verse:
He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death
  And broke their bands apart.
psalm-107-14.prayer: Father, bring me out of darkness and break every chain that keeps me from walking freely with You.

psalm-107-15.verse:
Let them give thanks to the Lord for His lovingkindness,
  And for His wonders to the sons of men!
psalm-107-15.prayer: Lord, help me thank You for Your lovingkindness and for Your wonderful works in my life.

psalm-107-16.verse:
For He has shattered gates of bronze
  And cut bars of iron asunder.
psalm-107-16.prayer: Father, break through every barrier that keeps me bound and open the way to freedom in You.

psalm-107-17.verse:
Fools, because of their rebellious way,
  And because of their iniquities, were afflicted.
psalm-107-17.prayer: Lord, forgive the foolish choices that bring pain into my life. Teach me wisdom and repentance.

psalm-107-18.verse:
Their soul abhorred all kinds of food,
  And they drew near to the gates of death.
psalm-107-18.prayer: Father, when my soul feels weak or empty, restore my desire for what is good, true, and life-giving.

psalm-107-19.verse:
Then they cried out to the Lord in their trouble;
  He saved them out of their distresses.
psalm-107-19.prayer: Lord, when I cry out in trouble, save me from distress and lead me into healing.

psalm-107-20.verse:
He sent His word and healed them,
  And delivered them from their destructions.
psalm-107-20.prayer: Father, send Your Word and heal me. Deliver me from what destroys and restore me by Your truth.

psalm-107-21.verse:
Let them give thanks to the Lord for His lovingkindness,
  And for His wonders to the sons of men!
psalm-107-21.prayer: Lord, help me give thanks for Your lovingkindness and for the wonderful works You do for Your people.

psalm-107-22.verse:
Let them also offer sacrifices of thanksgiving,
  And tell of His works with joyful singing.
psalm-107-22.prayer: Father, let my life offer sacrifices of thanksgiving and joyfully tell of all You have done.

psalm-107-23.verse:
Those who go down to the sea in ships,
  Who do business on great waters;
psalm-107-23.prayer: Lord, when I step into deep and uncertain waters, help me trust Your presence and guidance.

psalm-107-24.verse:
They have seen the works of the Lord,
  And His wonders in the deep.
psalm-107-24.prayer: Father, open my eyes to see Your works and wonders even in places that feel vast or overwhelming.

psalm-107-25.verse:
For He spoke and raised up a stormy wind,
  Which lifted up the waves of the sea.
psalm-107-25.prayer: Lord, You command the storm and the waves. Help me remember that every storm is under Your authority.

psalm-107-26.verse:
They rose up to the heavens, they went down to the depths;
  Their soul melted away in their misery.
psalm-107-26.prayer: Father, when life rises and falls around me, steady my heart and keep me from losing courage.

psalm-107-27.verse:
They reeled and staggered like a drunken man,
  And were at their wits’ end.
psalm-107-27.prayer: Lord, when my wisdom reaches its limit, teach me to depend completely on You.

psalm-107-28.verse:
Then they cried to the Lord in their trouble,
  And He brought them out of their distresses.
psalm-107-28.prayer: Father, when I cry to You in trouble, bring me out of distress and into Your peace.

psalm-107-29.verse:
He caused the storm to be still,
  So that the waves of the sea were hushed.
psalm-107-29.prayer: Lord, calm the storm and quiet the waves around me and within me.

psalm-107-30.verse:
Then they were glad because they were quiet,
  So He guided them to their desired haven.
psalm-107-30.prayer: Father, thank You for bringing me safely through storms and guiding me to peace.

psalm-107-31.verse:
Let them give thanks to the Lord for His lovingkindness,
  And for His wonders to the sons of men!
psalm-107-31.prayer: Lord, help me give thanks for Your lovingkindness and for Your wonderful works to Your people.

psalm-107-32.verse:
Let them extol Him also in the congregation of the people,
  And praise Him at the seat of the elders.
psalm-107-32.prayer: Father, let my life exalt You among others and praise You wherever You place me.

psalm-107-33.verse:
He changes rivers into a wilderness
  And springs of water into a thirsty ground;
psalm-107-33.prayer: Lord, You can turn rivers into wilderness. Help me live with reverence and not take Your blessings for granted.

psalm-107-34.verse:
A fruitful land into a salt waste,
  Because of the wickedness of those who dwell in it.
psalm-107-34.prayer: Father, protect me from choices that turn fruitful places into barrenness. Lead me in righteousness.

psalm-107-35.verse:
He changes a wilderness into a pool of water
  And a dry land into springs of water;
psalm-107-35.prayer: Lord, You can turn wilderness into pools of water. Bring life, renewal, and hope into dry places.

psalm-107-36.verse:
And there He makes the hungry to dwell,
  So that they may establish an inhabited city,
psalm-107-36.prayer: Father, settle my soul in Your provision and help me build my life where You lead.

psalm-107-37.verse:
And sow fields and plant vineyards,
  And gather a fruitful harvest.
psalm-107-37.prayer: Lord, bless the work You give me and let what I plant bear fruit according to Your will.

psalm-107-38.verse:
Also He blesses them and they multiply greatly,
  And He does not let their cattle decrease.
psalm-107-38.prayer: Father, thank You for multiplying blessing and sustaining what belongs to You.

psalm-107-39.verse:
When they are diminished and bowed down
  Through oppression, misery and sorrow,
psalm-107-39.prayer: Lord, when hardship, sorrow, or oppression brings people low, bring comfort, justice, and restoration.

psalm-107-40.verse:
He pours contempt upon princes
  And makes them wander in a pathless waste.
psalm-107-40.prayer: Father, humble the proud and guide those who are lost back toward truth and wisdom.

psalm-107-41.verse:
But He sets the needy securely on high away from affliction,
  And makes his families like a flock.
psalm-107-41.prayer: Lord, lift the needy from affliction and protect families with Your faithful care.

psalm-107-42.verse:
The upright see it and are glad;
  But all unrighteousness shuts its mouth.
psalm-107-42.prayer: Father, let the upright see Your works and rejoice. Silence evil and let righteousness prevail.

psalm-107-43.verse:
Who is wise? Let him give heed to these things,
  And consider the lovingkindnesses of the Lord.
psalm-107-43.prayer: Lord, give me wisdom to observe Your ways and understand Your lovingkindness with a grateful heart.

psalm-107-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your enduring lovingkindness, redemption, guidance, healing, and deliverance. You satisfy the weary, break chains, calm storms, restore dry places, and lift the needy with compassion. Help me remember Your works, walk in wisdom, and give thanks in every season. May my life continually declare Your goodness and trust Your faithful love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
